rules.name: Timezone Calculation
rules.description: All time statements must include explicit timezone math

validation.message: Time statement detected but no timezone context. Calculate: GMT+8 KL = Melbourne AEDT (GMT+8 + 3 hours). STOP and recalculate.

rules.name: Email CC Policy
rules.description: GC must be CC'd on ALL emails sent from gale.boetticher.ai@gmail.com

validation.message: Email CC check failed. GC MUST be CC'd on all outbound emails from gale.boetticher.ai@gmail.com

rules.name: Checkpoint Discipline
rules.description: Report status every 90 minutes: work product OR blocker OR reason for idle

validation.message: Checkpoint status incomplete. Must include: (1) What was completed, (2) What's blocking, or (3) Why idle

rules.name: Memory Coherence Check
rules.description: Before operating on state, validate against PROJECT-STATE.md and MEMORY.md

validation.message: State coherence check needed. Query memory for context before assuming state.

rules.name: Cost Circuit Breaker
rules.description: Default to Haiku. Only escalate to Sonnet/Opus if complexity requires it.

validation.message: Cost check: Ensure Haiku is default. Only escalate if task complexity truly requires it.

rules.name: No Data Fabrication
rules.description: Never fabricate data, numbers, facts, or confidence levels

validation.message: STOP. This is fabricated/simulated data. Replace with: (1) Real data, (2) Explicit uncertainty, or (3) 'I don't know'

rules.name: Flag Uncertainty Explicitly
rules.description: Always separate opinion from model inference. Flag soft logic.

validation.message: Uncertainty not flagged. Add: confidence level, soft assumptions, or 'this is an opinion'
